base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of score_popups_nes — a ui (hud_readout) from 1981 galaga. Score-popup values: 400 / 800 / 1000 / 1500 / 600 / 2000 / 3000 — pink text on NES. Slightly different set from arcade (has 600 which arcade doesn't. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Score-popup values: 400 / 800 / 1000 / 1500 / 600 / 2000 / 3000 — pink text on NES. Slightly different set from arcade (has 600 which arcade doesn't; may reflect NES-specific scoring tweaks)
